name: core.openwop.http
description: Spec-canonical HTTP fetch node. Single typeId `core.openwop.http.fetch` with retry, exponential backoff, and deterministic Idempotency-Key derivation for replay safety. Authentication is the workflow author's concern — pass an `Authorization` header via the `headers` config field (literal token or resolved via the host's secret-injection mechanism). The pack itself declares no `requiresSecrets` so it runs on every host regardless of `secrets.supported`. Zero npm deps; uses Node 20's built-in fetch (undici).
author: OpenWOP Working Group
